externalConsequence.target: replace with exact Channel provider, account/project, provider routing identity, and webhook

environment.target: replace with exact Channel provider, account/project, provider routing identity, and webhook

journeyResults.oracle: Replace with a sanitized provider acceptance and consequence oracle.
Replace or remove this placeholder so the packet names only the exact provider journey and its typing start/stop outcomes.

commandReceipt.invocation: run the named Channel provider operation after its authority gate
commandReceipt.invariant: A send requires exact recipient-safe target, approval, and rollback.
commandReceipt.recoveryHint: Attach authority and readback; otherwise stop without sending.
commandReceipt.postcondition: No message is sent by this template.

externalReadback.receipt: replace with sanitized provider account/project, routing identity, webhook, and operation readback

postconditions: No external messaging consequence is established.
limitations: Provider acceptance, Eve completion, recipient delivery, and typing display are different claims.
nonClaims: This template contains no message content and proves no delivery or visible typing.
